method: features.json selected_by_pct is null, so EO triangulated from league.json (15-man mini-league: template = Haaland/B.Fernandes/Gabriel; differentials clustered at 6.7% = 1 of 15 managers) plus GW38 web signals (Haaland ~35% captaincy poll + near-universal ownership; Bruno 2nd at ~26%; Salah 3rd). EO = overall ownership + captaincy uplift. Reconciled against the user's REAL GW38 squad (squad.json): Haaland is UNAVAILABLE on the bench, C=Bowen, VC=Salah.

template_core.note: Most-owned and most-captained GW38 asset, home vs Villa. User OWNS him but he is UNAVAILABLE and benched — the squad gets ZERO of his points. This is the dominant rank exposure.
Mini-league template and 2nd-most-popular captain. NOT in user squad — uncoverable template gap in the final GW.
3rd captaincy pick; user owns him and has him as VC, so EO exposure is favourable here.
Mini-league template defender, user owns. DOUBTFUL — if he sits, user concedes template CS ground.

differentials.why: User's captain at sub-8% EO vs the ~35% Haaland field. The cleanest rank-gain lever in the squad if he hauls; leverage cuts both ways.
League-flagged AVL attacking mid, owned by user. Sub-8% EO, set-piece/attacking role gives real rank swing on a haul.
AVL penalty/big-chance share; genuine sub-8% differential striker (not owned).
CHE mid, league diff, low-EO ceiling play.
NEW midfield, league diff, low EO with returns upside.
ARS attacking-FB differential, CS + returns leverage at sub-8% EO.

rank_risks.detail: Highest-EO asset in the game (~145% with captaincy), owned but UNAVAILABLE on the user bench. If he starts and hauls, the ~35%-captaining field doubles a big score while the user banks nothing — the single biggest rank threat in the final GW. No transfers/chips (only TC) realistically fix it pre-deadline.
C=Bowen (~7% EO) vs consensus Haaland (~35%). Largest deliberate variance source; a Bowen blank + Haaland haul is the worst case for rank 7.
~95% EO template + alt-captain. Any returns swing the mini-league against the user with no cover.
Owned template defender flagged doubtful; if he sits, user loses CS template ground while rivals cover.
